payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark-painted carved fireplace surround with stepped molding and a visible vertical wavy decorative groove; the inner firebox is a black void at the crop edge and the surround is partially cut off on the right — appears to be photographed close-up (~0.8 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"dark carved fireplace surround (partial)","long_description":"Close-up of a dark-painted carved fireplace surround with stepped molding and a visible vertical wavy decorative groove; the inner firebox is a black void at the crop edge and the surround is partially cut off on the right — appears to be photographed close-up (~0.8 m from camera).","attributes":["dark-painted finish","carved stepped molding","vertical wavy groove","matte surface","black firebox void","edge-cropped / partial","close-up (~0.8 m)","adjacent wallpaper visible"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
